content:
{"cards": [{"name": "Embercharge Raider", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Move fast, strike hard, disappear faster."", "power": "3", "toughness": "1", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Aggressive red creature testing the P+T ceiling at common (3+1=4, CMC+1=4, so right at the edge). Haste enables immediate pressure, menace makes it harder to chump block. The 3/1 body trades power for vulnerability, fitting red's aggressive philosophy."}, {"name": "Worldfire Ancient", "mana_cost": "{6}{R}{R}", "cmc": 8, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, haste
When ~ enters, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.
{2}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "It remembers when the world was young and everything burned.", "power": "7", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Splashy mythic dragon with immediate board impact and activated ability for late-game mana sink. The ETB ability can remove threats or deal significant player damage. The pump ability scales with available mana. At 8 mana, it needs to be powerful enough to warrant the cost while still being answerable."}, {"name": "Verdant Wayfinding", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The forest speaks to those who know how to listen.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple land search spell testing the standard 'search your library' templating. Costed at 2 mana to avoid being too efficient while remaining playable. Only searches for basics to keep power level appropriate for common. The reveal clause is standard for search effects that put cards into hand."}, {"name": "Ironbark Trampler", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "Where it walks, the earth trembles and the trees part like grass.", "power": "7", "toughness": "5", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Testing the common creature P/T ceiling with a 6-mana 7/5. P+T=12, CMC+3=9, so this exceeds the guideline but the high mana cost and single keyword justify it. Trample fits green's philosophy and makes the large body more threatening. The double green in cost reinforces color commitment."}, {"name": "Grove Sanctuary", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Creatures you control with power 4 or greater have trample.
{1}{G}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Multi-ability enchantment testing static ability + activated ability templating. The static ability rewards playing large creatures (green's specialty), while the activated ability provides incremental value. The tap cost prevents immediate double activation and adds strategic timing decisions. Power level is appropriate for uncommon."}]}
